review_text: The most pretty place to drive into on dusk, leafy sunkissed spot with still glasy water to Kayak. Gorgeous bird life and bush. Quiet. Stunning. We will return

Fantastic hidden away place for boating. Only suggestion if hiring a cabin is to take surface spray as we were absolutely smashed constantly  with ants, both small and large which was not ideal.for sleeping without concern of ant bites.
Staff are absolutely lovely people, a credit to the park.
Would go again
Hosts were really friendly. Location was fantastic. Very peaceful and relaxing place to stay.

A hidden gem for nature lovers 🌿
Wildlife, beautiful scenery, and the most calming place to escape and reset.
So refreshing from the usual over commercialised  holiday parks!
The staff are ever so lovely and the kids have already asked to go back again 🙌🦚

Beautiful location, by the water !
The kitchen area is great but sadly the bathroom are very old and quite dirty

Absolutely amazing place - breathtaking scenery - totally wild and unspoilt and not commercialised - but still the convenience of bathrooms and cooking area.
Great to chill and get away from the ratrace and NO phone signal which makes it a real holiday!!
Staff are amazing so friendly and relaxed - best camping trip ever!
Will definitely come back :)

We turned up in a big van with hubby in wheelchair. Thank you to Peter for your kindness and help.
Beautiful place.
What a place, grounds people are amazing. Right on the Hawkesbury river, amenities are awesome, camping grounds are bloody great, and you are surrounded by nature.
I spent a couple of nights here, one with my son and one on my own. I LOVE THIS PLACE. Great amenities, great hosts. I will be back regularly!

Its not bad pretty average
Nice location hearing birds and fishing
Down side the showers are not great bathroom messy
But that's minor
Its worth the location but the money is a bit pricey
好玩儿
It may be a small campground, but the views are beautiful and the trail is great for an adventure. Thank you, we really had a great time!

I have never experienced such hospitality, kindness, generous people. No problem is a problem for them, if you have an issue they will look into it and solve it. They honestly want you to have the best experience possible when staying with them. I look forward to going there again. It will be my 5th visit.
Shout out to Sherry, Larry, and the funny man Peter. Very entertaining man.

The trip down the mountain is a little hairy in places but once you're down - paradise!! Sheree, Larry and Pete are wonderful hosts, helpful, friendly and up for a laugh. The grounds of the park were immaculate, amenities clean and well looked after and the local wildlife are so cute. We camped as a group and would highly recommend
Great camping spot and reasonably priced

Beautiful spot nestled in the bush on the Hawkesbury River. Good fishing an hour from Sydney. Steep descent in but manageable by car. Boat ramp, piers, caravans. Nothing to do but relax. Camp-fires allowed. Plenty of big dog bream and flathead. Nice mud crabs if your lucky. Great hospitality. Brilliant spot. Locals consist of Goannas, Guinea fowls, Peacocks and Ducks.

Прекрасное место для отдыха с палаткой или кемпером. Прекрасные виды, лес, река. Подходит для активного отдыха, рыбалки или ловли крабов. На территории есть бассейн, небольшой магазин, зона барбекю с холодильником, микроволновкой и мангалами. Есть душ, туалет и вода.
Love the area. Nice place to camp with many water activities. Highly recommended!

What an amazing part of the hawkesbury. The staff are amazingly helpful. The road in/out was not the best, I was a little nervous towing up and down, but it is fine, make sure you call ahead so they can block the road just for you (its a bit narrow in some parts). The park has beautiful surrounding forest with peacocks coming to visit your site. Seems to be the closest park for the postman river cruise. I thoroughly enjoyed my stay.

plus: great place if you'd like to go back to nature. place is very secluded and very quiet. gorgeous nature. staffs were very friendly.
minus: the roads leading to this place is bumpy. need to be very careful. amenities were not readily available, we had no water in the kitchen. lots of mosquitos so bring your mosquito repellent.

clean and feel safe.nice environment with a few peacocks. no supply of hotwater one night when we were there for two nights but it was supplied the next morning.generally, it was a pretty good camping experience for us.
We camped so hence no star rating for rooms. Awesome location on the river. Amenities block was dated but adequate and good hot showers. View from the lookout just stunning.

A pretty secluded spot to camp. Owners are very helpful and easy to deal with. Steep decent amongst beautiful bushland and native flowers. Right on the river. Clean amenities. Great lookout at the top. Well worth a visit for some down time. .

What a great location, nothing fancy but if you come when it's not a long weekend it can end up being a nice relaxing weekend camping away. Unfortunately we can hear loud drunk groups of campers who are still up after 1am playing music and chatting away...when the park rules state " 10pm to 8am" is quite times. Inconsiderate A-HOLES!!

너무 멋진경험이였습니다.
다음주말에 다시 갈 예정입니다!
not for the faint off heart, road in is step and narrow ,excellent park well maintained and clean ,right on the river so a boat/canoe is a good idea

Great place to camp. About a 15-minute drive from the M1 motorway. Note that the last section of the dirt road down to the caravan park is not asphalt so can be slippery when wet.

Peter was a great host and made sure we had everything we needed to have a good time.

The camp site overlooks the lake and is bordered by a bush trail.

Highly recommended to book in advance.

Cute old-fashioned caravan and camping park in a spectacular location along the banks of the Hawkesbury. We had a spacious and well-grassed tent site. The staff is very helpful and friendly. The amenities are functional but a bit tired and could do with an update, and you have to drive down a steep gravel road to get there.
A great place for a family/fishing getaway - I imagine if you have a boat this would be the perfect spot.
Loveliest people, park is like a nature resort absolutely beautiful and the kids had loads of fun seeing the different animals

Absolutely beautiful campung location on the river, with a team of wonderful staff who are so willing to help and make the stay as effortless and enjoyable as possible.

By far our favourite camp ground.

The best camp site in NSW!! Pete, Larry & the team are the most wonderful people & helpful beyond words. We have visited this park a number of times and cant get enough of it. Every time we leave, we cant wait to go back! Just spent 3 nights there over Australia Day with 8 friends and everyone had the most amazing time. Perfectly situated in the most gorgeous surroundings!! Thank you Pete & Larry for being so welcoming & helpful during our stay.
Great little campsite with super helpful & nice staff. A true hidden gem!
Just went for a quick look. Road to get there is pretty rough (dirt). Once you get there it's a very nice caravan park.
Beautiful location, sadly in need of much TLC. Facilities need someone who knows how to clean and grounds need someone who respects campers needs and knows maintenance requirements. Will not be back.

The staff were so friendly & such a pleasure to deal with!! The location was remote but absolutely stunning (we had a site right on the river).
Had a little pool too which was great fun! Would go back 😊

Beautiful location just over an hour away from Sydney, making it a perfect weekend camping getaway.

Pete is a wonderful host, even going as far to help us arrange a jump start for our car's flat battery early on Monday morning!

We'll be back again for sure.

We just returned from an over night stay at Greenmans on the hawkesbury. What an amazing time. Everyone so friendly and the staff went out of there way to assist in anyway they could. For example went to buy some fire wood from the office which was very reasonably priced and they brought it over to the camp site for us. Also advised on best way to tow the driveway as we were only on our second trip. People’s reviews on the driveway are way out the road is not difficult to navigate if you follow the advise.
Great when it's quiet
the best campsite 10/10. amazing location with incredible views and the best staff to make it such a perfect stay. we’ve fallen in love with this hidden gem and can’t wait to go back already!!
Fantastic - lovely people - stunning location and a free Adrenalin hit with the drive in and out

Didn't like this place. There was a loud group of people partying, listening to loud music, screaming and pissing into the laundry machines. The next day, the amenities were in the awful state. Left the camping as soon as I woke up.
Camped here over the weekend for the first time. Friendly and inviting and a beautiful spot on the river. Looking forward to going again many times in the future.

20 men stayed 2 nights with own camping equipments.
Good place for relaxing. 👍🏻
Perfect place isolated from outside. 👍🏻
Hot water for shower 👍🏻
Public kitchen 👍🏻
Many wild birds near you. 🤔
We needed to cancel our booking the night before we were due to arrive, the owners were very understanding and refunded payment - we look forward to staying with them next time we are in the area.
Camped and loved it.... very beautiful by the water

we had a great weekend here great place to unwind by the camp fire.
the people running the place are so friendly and could not do enough for us we will return for sure
